name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement

## Summary

Brief description of the feature or enhancement you are proposing.

## Use case

Why would this be useful? For example: a specific workflow, a missing capability, or compatibility with another tool.

## Possible implementation

If you have ideas on how this could be implemented (e.g. new CLI flag, config option, or change in behavior), describe them here. Optional.

## Additional context

Any other context, examples, or references.
